'''tathufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loadometer|loadometer]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loadometer|loadometer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tathufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæthifith|tæthifith]] || [[word:tæthifij|tæthifij]] || [[word:tæthifish|tæthifish]] || [[word:tæthifi|tæthifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tathuthufuth|tathuthufuth]] || [[word:tathuthufuj|tathuthufuj]] || [[word:tathuthufush|tathuthufush]] || [[word:tathuthufu|tathuthufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tathufuth|tathufuth]] || [[word:tathufuj|tathufuj]] || [[word:tathufush|tathufush]] || [[word:tathufu|tathufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tathuffuth|tathuffuth]] || [[word:tathuffuj|tathuffuj]] || [[word:tathuffush|tathuffush]] || [[word:tathuffuf|tathuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tathufuthu|tathufuthu]] || [[word:tathufuju|tathufuju]] || [[word:tathufushu|tathufushu]] || [[word:tathufuku|tathufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tathufuth|tathufuth]] || [[word:tathufuj|tathufuj]] || [[word:tathufush|tathufush]] || [[word:tathufu|tathufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tathufuthul|tathufuthul]] || [[word:tathufujul|tathufujul]] || [[word:tathufushul|tathufushul]] || [[word:tathufukul|tathufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tathufuthuthu|tathufuthuthu]] || [[word:tathufujuju|tathufujuju]] || [[word:tathufushushu|tathufushushu]] || [[word:tathufuku|tathufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tathufuthun|tathufuthun]] || [[word:tathufujun|tathufujun]] || [[word:tathufushun|tathufushun]] || [[word:tathufukun|tathufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tathufuthuoro|tathufuthuoro]] || [[word:tathufujuoro|tathufujuoro]] || [[word:tathufushuoro|tathufushuoro]] || [[word:tathufukuoro|tathufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
